title: Project Structure for Agents
description: Organize your codebase so agents can navigate, understand, and modify it effectively

lessons.title: Why Structure Matters for Agents
lessons.description: How project layout directly impacts agent comprehension and success rate

lessons.title: File Organization Patterns
lessons.description: Directory layouts, colocation strategies, and barrel files that help agents find code

lessons.title: Naming Conventions That Help Agents
lessons.description: File names, function names, and variable names that reduce agent confusion

lessons.title: Documentation as Context
lessons.description: READMEs, type annotations, and inline docs that serve as agent navigation aids

lessons.title: Monorepos and Large Codebases
lessons.description: Agent-ready patterns for monorepos, microservices, and codebases with 1000+ files
